**You MUST use CLI commands for lesson management:**

- Test fails then you fix it

**Quality gate** (must pass before capturing):
- Novel (not already stored)
- Specific (clear guidance)
- Actionable (preferred, not mandatory)

**Workflow**: Search BEFORE deciding, capture AFTER learning.

# Beads Workflow Context

> **Context Recovery**: Run `bd prime` after compaction, clear, or new session
> Hooks auto-call this in Claude Code when .beads/ detected

# 🚨 SESSION CLOSE PROTOCOL 🚨

**CRITICAL**: Before saying "done" or "complete", you MUST run this checklist:

```
[ ] 1. git status              (check what changed)
[ ] 2. git add <files>         (stage code changes)
[ ] 3. git commit -m "..."     (commit code)
[ ] 4. git push                (push to remote)
```

**NEVER skip this.** Work is not done until pushed.

## Core Rules
- **Default**: Use beads for ALL task tracking (`bd create`, `bd ready`, `bd close`)
- **Prohibited**: Do NOT use TodoWrite, TaskCreate, or markdown files for task tracking
- **Workflow**: Create beads issue BEFORE writing code, mark in_progress when starting
- **Memory**: Use `bd remember "insight"` for persistent knowledge across sessions. Do NOT use MEMORY.md files — they fragment across accounts. Search with `bd memories <keyword>`.
- Persistence you don't need beats lost context
- Git workflow: beads auto-commit to Dolt, run `git push` at session end
- Session management: check `bd ready` for available work

## Essential Commands

### Finding Work
- `bd ready` - Show issues ready to work (no blockers)
- `bd list --status=open` - All open issues
- `bd list --status=in_progress` - Your active work
- `bd show <id>` - Detailed issue view with dependencies

### Creating & Updating
- `bd create --title="Summary of this issue" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=task|bug|feature --priority=2` - New issue
  - Priority: 0-4 or P0-P4 (0=critical, 2=medium, 4=backlog). NOT "high"/"medium"/"low"
- `bd update <id> --claim` - Claim work
- `bd update <id> --assignee=username` - Assign to someone
- `bd update <id> --title/--description/--notes/--design` - Update fields inline
- `bd close <id>` - Mark complete
- `bd close <id1> <id2> ...` - Close multiple issues at once (more efficient)
- `bd close <id> --reason="explanation"` - Close with reason
- **Tip**: When creating multiple issues/tasks/epics, use parallel subagents for efficiency
- **WARNING**: Do NOT use `bd edit` - it opens $EDITOR (vim/nano) which blocks agents

### Dependencies & Blocking
- `bd dep add <issue> <depends-on>` - Add dependency (issue depends on depends-on)
- `bd blocked` - Show all blocked issues
- `bd show <id>` - See what's blocking/blocked by this issue

### Sync & Collaboration
- `bd dolt push` - Push beads to Dolt remote
- `bd dolt pull` - Pull beads from Dolt remote
- `bd search <query>` - Search issues by keyword

### Project Health
- `bd stats` - Project statistics (open/closed/blocked counts)
- `bd doctor` - Check for issues (sync problems, missing hooks)

## Common Workflows

**Starting work:**
```bash
bd ready           # Find available work
bd show <id>       # Review issue details
bd update <id> --claim  # Claim it
```

**Completing work:**
```bash
bd close <id1> <id2> ...    # Close all completed issues at once
git add . && git commit -m "..."  # Commit code changes
git push                    # Push to remote
```

**Creating dependent work:**
```bash
# Run bd create commands in parallel (use subagents for many items)
bd create --title="Implement feature X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=feature
bd create --title="Write tests for X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=task
bd dep add beads-yyy beads-xxx  # Tests depend on Feature (Feature blocks tests)
```

○ long-running-harness-3as [EPIC] · Polish: Design system consistency and token compliance   [● P2 · OPEN]
Owner: Nathan Delacrétaz · Type: epic
Created: 2026-03-29 · Updated: 2026-03-29

DESCRIPTION
Enforce consistent use of design tokens across all CSS modules. Fix undefined variables, z-index mismatches, and hardcoded values.

## Findings (from CSS audit)

### Critical
- Tooltip z-index hardcoded to 10 (Tooltip.module.css line 8) -- should be var(--z-tooltip) which is 600. Tooltip will render BEHIND overlays, modals, and context menus.
- RoutingMatrix references var(--color-gray-800) which does NOT exist in tokens.css -- will fall back to initial value (transparent)
- RoutingMatrix uses var(--color-cyan, #06b6d4) -- cyan is NOT in the Neo-Brutalist palette. Should be blue or green.

### High
- MediaPoolPanel uses 1px borders (lines 19, 28) instead of var(--border-width) which is 2px -- inconsistent visual weight
- SynthEditor and DrumMachinePanel construct BORDER string manually from tokens instead of using CSS variable
- Inline z-index: 9999 in ClickToStart.tsx instead of var(--z-overlay)
- Semantic color tokens (success, warning, error) defined in tokens.css but components use raw palette colors instead

### Medium
- Hardcoded font-size 9px in MixerPanel.module.css and RoutingMatrix.module.css -- not in token system
- Math on tokens in SynthEditor (tokens.text.xs - 1) -- should use predefined token
- Gap values used as raw numbers without token reference in SynthEditor, DrumMachinePanel
- Missing responsive @media rules for 1024px minimum viewport
- Fader track 4px width and thumb 12x8px slightly off 8px grid

### Low
- Redundant focus-visible declarations (Button.module.css duplicates global rule)
- Create reusable .truncate utility for text-overflow pattern used in multiple places
- Create semantic interaction tokens: --hover-bg, --active-bg, --disabled-opacity

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero undefined CSS variable references (no fallbacks hiding missing tokens)
- All z-index values use design system tokens from tokens.css
- All border widths use var(--border-width)
- All font sizes reference token scale (no raw px values outside tokens)
- All colors reference either palette or semantic tokens
- Add missing --color-gray-800 to tokens or refactor references to existing tokens
- Remove cyan and replace with palette-compliant color
- browser_evidence: visual diff before/after showing z-index fix, border consistency

## Files
- src/ui/primitives/Tooltip.module.css
- src/ui/mixer/RoutingMatrix.module.css
- src/ui/media-pool/MediaPoolPanel.module.css
- src/ui/mixer/MixerPanel.module.css
- src/ui/synth/SynthEditor.tsx
- src/ui/drum-machine/DrumMachinePanel.tsx
- src/ui/tokens/tokens.ts + tokens.css
- src/ui/layout/ClickToStart.tsx (or wherever z-index: 9999 lives)

DEPENDS ON
  → ✓ long-running-harness-0yz: Polish: QA verification via browser automation ● P1

Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document with all the findings:

## Comprehensive Design Token System & CSS Modules Exploration

I've thoroughly explored the design token system and CSS modules in this codebase. Here are all the findings:

### 1. **Design Token Files**

#### `/Users/Nathan/Documents/Code/long-running-harness/src/ui/tokens/tokens.css`
Complete CSS custom properties system with:
- **Colors**: black, white, blue (#0066ff), pink (#ff2d6f), green (#39ff14), amber (#ffb800), red (#ff0000)
- **Grays**: gray-900 (#111111), gray-700 (#333333), gray-500 (#666666), gray-300 (#999999), gray-100 (#e5e5e5)
- **Typography**: JetBrains Mono, system fonts, sizes from 10px to 48px
- **Spacing**: 4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 48px, 64px
- **Z-Index Scale**: base(0), dropdown(100), sticky(200), overlay(300), modal(400), popover(500), tooltip(600), context-menu(700)
- **Borders**: 2px width, gray-700 color
- **Shadows**: sm, md, lg variations
- **Focus Ring**: 2px solid blue with 2px offset
- **Transitions**: 100ms fast, 200ms normal

#### `/Users/Nathan/Documents/Code/long-running-harness/src/ui/tokens/tokens.ts`
TypeScript export of token values (matches CSS variables)

### 2. **Critical Issues Found**

**UNDEFINED CSS VARIABLES:**
- `--color-gray-800` referenced in: `/src/ui/mixer/RoutingMatrix.module.css` (lines 56, 124) - **NOT DEFINED** in tokens.css
- `--color-cyan` referenced in: `/src/ui/mixer/RoutingMatrix.module.css` (line 123) with fallback `#06b6d4` - **NOT DEFINED** in tokens.css
- `--color-gray-400` referenced in: `/src/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx` (line 51) with fallback `#888` - **NOT DEFINED** in tokens.css

**HARDCODED Z-INDEX VALUES:**
- `z-index: 10` in `/src/ui/primitives/Tooltip.module.css` (line 8) - should use `--z-tooltip: 600`
- `zIndex: 9999` in `/src/ui/ClickToStart.tsx` (line 22) - way above defined scale
- `zIndex: 1` in `/src/ui/synth/VirtualKeyboard.tsx` (line 103) - relative positioning only
- `zIndex: 2` in `/src/ui/synth/VirtualKeyboard.tsx` (line 141) - relative positioning only

**HARDCODED FONT SIZES:**
- `font-size: 9px` in `/src/ui/mixer/RoutingMatrix.module.css` (lines 92, 122) - no token equivalent (closest is `--text-xs: 10px`)

**HARDCODED BORDERS:**
- `border-bottom: 1px` in `/src/ui/media-pool/MediaPoolPanel.module.css` (line 19) - should use `--border: 2px`
- `border: 1px` in `/src/ui/media-pool/MediaPoolPanel.module.css` (line 28) - should use `--border: 2px`
- Inline `border: 1px solid` in multiple TSX files (MediaPoolItem.tsx, ErrorBoundary.tsx, synth/ModulationMatrix.tsx)

### 3. **CSS Module Files (Complete Contents)**

#### `/src/ui/primitives/Tooltip.module.css`
- Position: absolute, inline-block wrapper
- z-index: 10 (ISSUE: should be 600)
- Uses tokens for padding, colors, fonts
- Four placement variants (top, bottom, left, right)

#### `/src/ui/mixer/RoutingMatrix.module.css`
- Uses `--color-gray-800` (UNDEFINED - line 56, 124)
- Uses `--color-cyan` with fallback (line 123)
- Two instances of `font-size: 9px` (lines 92, 122)
- Table-based layout with sends routing visualization
- `.sc-badge` for colored indicators

#### `/src/ui/media-pool/MediaPoolPanel.module.css`
- `border-bottom: 1px` and `border: 1px` instead of using `--border: 2px`
- Import button styling
- List and error states
- Importing state with spinner

#### `/src/ui/mixer/MixerPanel.module.css`
- Master strip with black background
- Channel strips with flex layout
- Button states (mute active, solo active)
- Meter and fader rows
- All uses token variables properly

#### `/src/ui/primitives/ContextMenu.module.css`
- `z-index: var(--z-context-menu)` - correct token usage
- Fixed positioning
- Animation keyframes

#### `/src/ui/primitives/Button.module.css`
- Size variants (sm, md, lg)
- Three button variants (primary, secondary, ghost)
- Focus and disabled states

#### `/src/ui/primitives/Modal.module.css`
- Dialog styling with 85% backdrop opacity
- Title bar with border
- No z-index (defaults to modal)

#### Other CSS Modules:
- **ArrangementPanel.module.css**: Basic flex container with border
- **Toggle.module.css**: Custom toggle with thumb animation
- **DrumPad.module.css**: Inline-flex buttons with pink active state
- **Fader.module.css**: Vertical fader with track and thumb
- **StepButton.module.css**: Grid step buttons with amber active state
- **Spinner.module.css**: Rotating border animation
- **Select.module.css**: Custom select dropdown styling
- **PianoRollEditor.module.css**: Flex container with toolbar and canvas
- **TransportBar.module.css**: Horizontal bar with play controls and metronome
- **panels.module.css**: Simple instrument panel wrapper

### 4. **TSX Files with Styling Issues**

#### `/src/ui/synth/SynthEditor.tsx`
- Inline token usage throughout
- Uses `tokens.border.width` with hardcoded "px solid"
- Proper section and label styles
- No z-index issues

#### `/src/ui/drum-machine/DrumMachinePanel.tsx`
- Inline token usage for layout and colors
- Proper TR-808 header styling
- Accent and instrument rows
- Pattern A/B selector buttons

#### `/src/ui/ClickToStart.tsx`
- **CRITICAL: zIndex: 9999** (line 22) - highest issue, should use token
- Uses CSS variables as strings: `var(--color-black)`, `var(--color-white)`
- Fixed overlay positioning

#### `/src/ui/synth/VirtualKeyboard.tsx`
- `zIndex: 1` and `zIndex: 2` for white/black keys
- Proper token usage for colors and borders
- Relative positioning only (z-index values are for stacking context)

#### `/src/ui/media-pool/MediaPoolItem.tsx`
- Inline styles with `1px solid` borders (should use `--border`)
- CSS variable usage: `var(--color-*)`, `var(--space-*)`
- Waveform preview integration

#### `/src/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx`
- References `--color-gray-400` (UNDEFINED)
- Uses fallback colors
- Inline hardcoded border: `1px solid var(--color-red)`
- Raw rem-based sizing instead of tokens

#### `/src/ui/global.css`
- Imports tokens.css
- Box-sizing reset, font setup
- Reduced motion media query support
- Focus visible styling

### 5. **Summary of Token System Issues**

**Missing Color Tokens:**
1. `--color-gray-800` - referenced in RoutingMatrix, not defined
2. `--color-gray-400` - referenced in ErrorBoundary, not defined
3. `--color-cyan` - referenced in RoutingMatrix, no fallback defined

**Missing Font Size Token:**
1. `9px` - used in RoutingMatrix, closest token is `10px`

**Inconsistent Border Usage:**
- Some files use `1px` instead of `--border: 2px`
- Mixed border approaches across codebase

**Z-Index Management Issues:**
- Tooltip uses `z-index: 10` instead of `--z-tooltip: 600`
- ClickToStart uses `z-index: 9999` instead of `--z-modal: 400`
- VirtualKeyboard uses relative z-index values (1, 2) instead of absolute positioning

All file paths are absolute and can be accessed directly. The codebase would benefit from standardizing all token references and fixing the undefined variable references.

**Z-Index Management Issues:**
- Tooltip uses `z-index: 10` instead of `--z-tooltip: 600`
- ClickToStart uses `z-index: 9999` instead of `--z-modal: 400`
- VirtualKeyboard uses relative z-index values (1, 2) instead of absolute positioning
